title: Intense Egyptian Tofu Grill
description: A fiery Egyptian-inspired tofu grill that marries saffron-infused marinades with smoky char and macrobiotic flair.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat and oil the grates lightly.
Whisk together olive oil, cumin, coriander, turmeric, saffron infusion, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper to create the marinades.
Place tofu slices in the bowl, turning to coat each side thoroughly, and let marinate for 15 minutes.
Remove tofu from the bowl and lay it flat on the preheated grill, cooking 3-4 minutes on each side until charred and golden.
Stir the remaining marinades and drizzle over the cooked tofu for an extra burst of flavor.
Transfer the tofu to a serving platter and sprinkle with fresh parsley.
Serve hot with a side of sautéed greens or a crisp lettuce salad.
Enjoy your intense Egyptian tofu grill as a macrobiotic-friendly dinner.
